dependencies: Third-party data center hosting facilities in the United States and other countries
Database software, hardware and data from various vendors
Large language models leveraged in AI offerings
Third-party infrastructure providers for data center expansion
risks: Interruptions or delays in services from third-party data center hosting facilities
Disruptions from cloud computing platform providers
Dependency on hardware and software vendors
Supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical developments in Europe leading to power disruptions
Reliance on third-party networks and services powering the Internet
Vulnerabilities in third-party products or components across the ecosystem

regulatory_risks: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) compliance
State data privacy laws in multiple U.S. states
India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
EU Digital Services Act (DSA)
EU Data Act
EU AI Act
Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) for EU financial sectors
Utah Artificial Intelligence Policy Act
Colorado Artificial Intelligence Act
Data localization requirements in various countries
Cross-border data transfer restrictions
Invalidation of EU-U.S. Privacy Shield Framework
Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) uncertainty
Industry-specific regulations for financial services, healthcare, telecommunications
Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards
Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) compliance
Antitrust and competition law changes in digital markets
Export control and economic sanctions regulations
U.S. Commerce Department's Export Administration Regulations
U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions
Government contract procurement regulations
ESG and sustainability reporting requirements
Climate-related disclosure requirements (SEC rules)
Cybersecurity incident disclosure requirements (SEC Form 8-K)
Intellectual property protection challenges in foreign jurisdictions
Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act limitations

sanction_risks: U.S. sanctions on Russia due to war in Ukraine
Regional conflict in the Middle East impacting operations
Evolving relations between the United States and China
Embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments and parties restrictions
Diversion of services to sanctioned countries and parties
Increased government regulation of AI and cloud service solutions in sanctioned jurisdictions
